MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Shelf and Seth Skootsky for and with Mary Spillane and Kathleen McDonagh (Petitioners/Trustees). Emilie Calhoun for Clair Ryan (Objector). John Scannell, James Scannel, Michael Scannell and Julie Hession (Beneficiaries) also present.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
